title: Corman Quien
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:CormanQuien-TESB.png]] |name=Corman Quien |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|V}}, including the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. {{InsiderCite|74|Who's Who in Echo Base: The Unsung Rebels of the Battle of Hoth}} establishes that Quien [[Death/Legends|died]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] during the battle's evacuation of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]]. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{Film|V}} |gender= |pronouns=He/him{{InsiderCite|74|Who's Who in Echo Base: The Unsung Rebels of the Battle of Hoth}} |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'll cover sector twelve. Have com control set to screen alpha.|Corporal Corman Quien|audio=JamiroAssistant.flac|''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]''}} '''Corman Quien''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] and [[Scout/Legends|scout]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Although he never thought his love of animals would benefit the Rebellion, Quien found use for his skills as a beast tamer. Assigned to [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]], Quien joined the [[Alliance Corps of Engineers/Legends|Alliance Corps of Engineers]] as one of the first to be sent to the newly established [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], where he helped capture and train the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] native [[Tauntaun/Legends|tauntauns]] as mounts. Quien [[Death/Legends|died]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] when a startled herd of tauntauns broke loose from their holdings, trampling him. ==Biography== {{Quote|One of you men take his reins!''"
"''Here, I'll take 'em.|Commander Tamizander Rey and Corporal Corman Quien, as Han Solo dismounts his tauntaun|{{ESBRadio|Freedom's Winter}}}} [[File:CormanQuien-CCG.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Corman Quien was responsible for taming Echo Base's tauntauns.]] [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] Corman Quien's value to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] came in his expertise with animals. The Alliance put his skills to use by charging Quien with the capture, taming, and training of native creatures to use as mounts or beasts of burden. In that capacity the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] assigned Quien to [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Kem Monnon/Legends|Kem Monnon's]] [[Alliance Corps of Engineers/Legends|Corps of Engineers]], the constructors of the Alliance's headquarters of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the remote [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. Quien's presence on Hoth proved more valuable than expected when the Alliance faced difficulty adapting the base's [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeders]] to the planet's freezing [[Temperature/Legends|temperatures]]. While Monnon's men built the base, Quien rounded up and tamed Hoth's native [[Tauntaun/Legends|tauntauns]] to use as mounts in place of [[Airspeeder/Legends|speeders]]. Quien's service as a tauntaun handler at Echo Base continued into [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. On one occasion, at the behest of [[Deck officer/Legends|deck officer]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tamizander Rey]], Quien took the reins of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] tauntaun to help him dismount the beast after Solo finished a routine patrol of Hoth's exterior plains around the base's outer perimeter with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], which ended in Skywalker being attacked by [[One-Arm|one]] of the planet's native [[Wampa/Legends|wampa]] ice creatures.{{CCG|set=Hoth Limited|cardname=Tauntaun Handler}} Soon thereafter, once Echo Base discovered that Skywalker had gone missing, Quien volunteered to cover Sector 12 as part of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Cal Alder/Legends|Cal Alder's]] search party for Skywalker. Quien instructed base control to set their [[surveillance camera]]s to alpha screen.[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back'' novelization]] Quien was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the Rebels' subsequent evacuation of Echo Base{{CSWECite|III|63|Quien, Corman}} during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], one of the Rebellion's worst defeats of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], when a startled herd of tauntauns broke free of their restraints and trampled him. Four others were similarly killed. Following his death, Quien became well-known as one of Echo Base's tauntaun handlers.{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031211hoth2|series=Hoth: Under the Ice|text=Part 2: Steady, Girl}} ==Personality and traits== Corman Quien was typical of [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] posted at Echo Base. He did not believe his love of animals was a skill that could be put to good use with the Rebellion, but Quien's service at Echo Base demonstrated the success the Rebels achieved by way of making use of their surroundings. He helped Echo Base round up Hoth's native tauntauns, effectively creating an alternative mode of transportation to the Rebels' snowspeeders. Quien, a [[Human/Legends|Human]], had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light skin. ==Equipment== While serving at Echo Base, Quien wore the Rebels' standard [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|cold-weather armor]]. At the [[Time/Legends|time]] he assisted Han Solo in dismounting his tauntaun, Quien donned only the [[Hat/Legends|hat]] portion of the [[Armor/Legends|outfit's]] [[Alliance Cold Weather Headgear|headgear]] as well as a [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|padded vest]], [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|lightweight tunic]], and [[Alliance Cold Weather armor|gloves]]. ==Behind the scenes== ===Notable appearances=== Corman Quien appears in the [[1980]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] as the individual who takes the reins of Han Solo's tauntaun when Solo first enters the Rebel base at the beginning of the film. "[[Freedom's Winter]]," the first episode of [[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' radio drama]], identifies the same person as a "sentry" at Echo Base's entrance. The original radio script, later [[The Empire Strikes Back: The National Public Radio Dramatization|published in book form]], had the same sentry appear in a later episode when Han Solo was setting out to find Luke, but this dialogue was cut from the final version.[[The Empire Strikes Back: The National Public Radio Dramatization|''The Empire Strikes Back'': The National Public Radio Dramatization]] The character went unnamed until the [[November]] [[1996]] ''[[Hoth Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] identified him as one "Corman Quien" on the [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/Hoth-Light/large/tauntaunhandler.gif "Tauntaun Handler" card]. Quien is also referenced in the [[February]] [[2004]] article [[Who's Who in Echo Base: The Unsung Rebels of the Battle of Hoth|''Who's Who in Echo Base'']], appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]], which establishes Quien's background as an animal enthusiast. The ''Star Wars Insider'' article identifies Quien as being the character behind the off-screen voice in ''The Empire Strikes Back'' who announces that he will "cover sector twelve" in the search for the missing Luke Skywalker, and it was the first source to confirm Quien's death at the Battle of Hoth. ===Inconsistencies=== The [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] adaptation of ''The Empire Strikes Back''—specifically, issue [[Star Wars (1977) 39|''Star Wars'' (1977) 39]]—shows Quien teasing Solo about looking cold and not demonstrating typical [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] toughness when he takes the reins of his tauntaun, to which Solo replies, "Cold isn't the word for it!"[[Star Wars (1977) 39|''Star Wars'' (1977) 39]] Alternatively, [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' novelization]] features a similar exchange during this same scene moments later between Solo and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], in which Solo recites the same line. However, the film shows no such verbal exchange between Quien and Solo. ==Appearances== *{{Film|V}} *[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'' junior novelization]] *[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 39|''Star Wars'' (1977) 39]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 39}} *{{ESBRadio|Freedom's Winter}} {{ID|Sentry}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Corman Quien}} *''[[The Empire Strikes Back Notebook]]'' {{Imo}} *[[The Empire Strikes Back: The National Public Radio Dramatization|''The Empire Strikes Back'': The National Public Radio Dramatization]] {{ID|Sentry}} *{{CCG|set=Hoth Limited|cardname=Tauntaun Handler}} {{1stID|Corman Quien}} *''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back: The Illustrated Screenplay]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20031211hoth2|series=Hoth: Under the Ice|text=Part 2: Steady, Girl}} *{{InsiderCite|74|Who's Who in Echo Base: The Unsung Rebels of the Battle of Hoth}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Action Figure Collection]]'' {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Corman Quien |nl=Corman Quien }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Quien, Corman}} [[Category:Alliance Army enlisted personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
